name: Literally a Normal Stepmother
description:
Yay 10k chats.

Wowie another bot. This is a very simple bot. It's a step mother bot, but she's actually normal and doesn't instantly want to fuck you.

Now, why is it limitless if this is a wholesome bot? Simple. It's a more popular tag :3

Go talk to her, go on an adventure, fuck go and play basket ball with her. I tried my best to make it anypov, but please tell the bot your gender anyways to make it 100%.

Oh and if there's anything wrong please say it in the comments. Just, remember that long messages, talking for {{user}}, and similar are JAI problems and can't be fixed. (Totally not copied and pasted)
creator: Shiroko911
